Original: Disable all game audio.   *** NOTE ***   Try changing this to YES if your game is crashing on launch or when starting a game.
Translation: 禁用游戏中的全部音效。*** 注意 *** 若游戏启动或开局时发生崩溃，请尝试将该项设为“是”。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Disables the flashing effect on the End Turn button, Selection Panel Apprentices count label, Clan Screen Unpack button, etc.
Translation: 禁用回合结束按钮、部队选择面板“学徒”计数标签、氏族界面“解包”按钮等处的闪烁效果。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: End Turn button no longer changes to bring up the Knowledge screen, Caravan screen, etc.
Translation: 回合结束按钮将不再自动切换到知识界面、商队界面等。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Disables the transition to strategic view when zoomed out.
Translation: 缩小视角时禁用切换至战略视图。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Disables the colored banner which appears at the start of every turn.
Translation: 禁用每回合开始时出现的彩色横幅。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Hides the helper icons displayed beneath the Profession Buttons in the Training and Research Screens.
Translation: 在“训练”与“研究”界面中，隐藏职业按钮下方显示的辅助图标。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Disables camera movement when the cursor is near the edge of the screen.
Translation: 当指针贴近屏幕边缘时禁用镜头移动。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).

Original: Allow the turn to be ended even if Units/Settlements haven't yet been given orders.
Translation: 即便单位或聚居尚未下达命令，也允许提前结束回合。
Note: Common setting help text candidate from skipped recheck (exact catalog original).
